name: Issue 队列生命周期
description: 定义 Issue 队列条目的生命周期管理规则

issue_lifecycle_states.name: 活跃
issue_lifecycle_states.description: 风险因素刚被触发，需要关注
issue_lifecycle_states.entry_condition: 风险扫描检测到风险因素触发
issue_lifecycle_states.exit_condition: 风险解除 → resolved 或 风险恶化 → escalated

issue_lifecycle_states.name: 已解决
issue_lifecycle_states.entry_condition: 风险信号消失或逻辑强度恢复

issue_lifecycle_states.name: 已升级
issue_lifecycle_states.description: 风险因素恶化，需要升级处理
issue_lifecycle_states.entry_condition: 风险信号增强或逻辑强度持续下降
issue_lifecycle_states.exit_condition: 风险解除 → resolved 或 逻辑瓦解 → output

low.description: 观察级别，逻辑强度轻微下降
low.notification: 不推送，仅在日报中汇总

medium.description: 关注级别，逻辑强度下降明显

high.description: 警告级别，逻辑强度大幅下降
high.notification: 立即推送 EventBus，Bot 通知

issue_resolution_rules.resolve_condition: logic_strength 恢复到触发前水平的 90% 以上
issue_resolution_rules.escalation_condition: logic_strength 继续下降超过 0.15 或 新增风险因素
